tools.title: CyberChef
tools.description: The Swiss-army knife for encodings and ciphers — bake a recipe to decode almost anything.

tools.title: ASCII table
tools.description: Reference sheet mapping characters to their decimal and hexadecimal codes.

levels.title: Welcome, agent
levels.description: Your first message was shifted a fixed number of places through the alphabet. Decrypt 'uftu1' (a Caesar cipher) and submit the original word.
hints: Every letter moved by the same amount — try all 25 shifts.
The shift is 1: step each letter back by one.

levels.title: Just a different writing
levels.description: This is not a cipher, only another way of writing bytes. Decode 'dGVzdDI=' and submit the result.
hints: The trailing '=' is the giveaway: it is Base64.

levels.title: Check the attachment
levels.description: The message did not fit in the brief — it is in an attached file. Download the file served for this level and read the flag inside.
hints: Fetch the file from this level's file route, then open it.

levels.title: Know your codes
levels.description: A short consolidation level. Solve it to earn a reference tool — the flag is simply 'test4'.
